unresolved_issues: The paper gives an abbreviated SIGMA description; complete household budget constraints, Calvo reset FOCs, wage reset FOCs, fiscal accounting, and nonlinear steady-state equations need companion-source review.
Several equations are implementation cross-checks rather than paper-printed equations.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
Raw PDF path was checked but PDF body was not read because no targeted formula discrepancy required it.
